title: Stop Trading Without These 3 ICT Checks (2026)
description: Before your next trade, run these 3 ICT checks. Most traders skip all three — then wonder why they keep losing. R2F Trading breaks it down in under 30 seconds. Follow for daily smart money concepts, order block setups, and funded trader tips. Visit r2ftrading.com for the full system.
script: Blown 3 funded accounts. Same mistake every time. You're probably making it right now. Check the weekly bias FIRST. No bias — no trade. 80% of blown accounts skip this step. Then find the order block. That's where smart money lives. Enter anywhere else — you're the liquidity. Finally — check for a fair value gap. Price fills the gap. Every. Single. Time. That's your entry. Three checks. Weekly bias. Order block. Fair value gap. That's the R2F Trading system. Follow for a new setup every day.
